heading: Rules and regulations
label: 49k Rules and regulations
text: The Secretary is authorized to make such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Amendments1998—, which directed the substitution of “The Secretary” for “The Director, with the approval of the Secretary of Labor,”, was executed by making the substitution for text which read in part “director” rather than “Director”, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 105–220
Effective Date of 1998 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , formerly set out as a note under .Pub. L. 105–220section 311 of Pub. L. 105–220section 49a of this titleJuly 1, 1999
